title: schoenus calceolus
intro: Schoenus calceolus, also known as button sedge, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory problems. Schoenus calceolus is often prepared in herbal teas or infusions, and its roots can be used in tinctures or dried for later use.
